import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_next(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i > n
    mut j = i - 1
    mut end_idx = j
    while end_idx < n
      match string.byte_at(s, end_idx)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          end_idx = n + 1
        else
          end_idx = end_idx + 1
        end
      when None
        end_idx = n
      end
    end
    let stop = if end_idx > n
      end_idx - 1
    else
      n
    end
    let token = string.substring(s, j, stop)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      Some(v)
    when None
      None
    end
  else
    None
  end
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn token_end(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = start
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        done = true
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  i
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let p1 = skip_ws(input, 0)
  let e1 = token_end(input, p1)
  let p2 = skip_ws(input, e1)
  let e2 = token_end(input, p2)
  let p3 = skip_ws(input, e2)
  let e3 = token_end(input, p3)

  let a_opt = string.parse_int(string.substring(input, p1, e1))
  let b_opt = string.parse_int(string.substring(input, p2, e2))
  let s_opt = string.parse_int(string.substring(input, p3, e3))

  let a = match a_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("invalid A")
  end
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("invalid B")
  end
  let s = match s_opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    panic("invalid S")
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut cur = a
  mut first = true
  while cur < b
    if first
      out = "#{cur}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{cur}"
    end
    cur = cur + s
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
